title: How to Create Pages Faster in GoHighLevel — AI Studio
description: Learn how to create pages faster in GoHighLevel using AI Studio. Generate professional landing pages in minutes with AI prompts, then customize and deploy instantly.
html_content:
Creating professional sales pages, landing pages, and funnels used to be a time-consuming process that required either design skills or hours of manual work. But AI Studio in GoHighLevel is changing that game—and it's a game-changer for agencies looking to scale faster.

If you're running an agency or managing client projects, you know the pressure: clients want results yesterday, your team is stretched thin, and every hour spent on page design is an hour not spent on strategy or client results. That's where AI Studio comes in. This intelligent page builder lets you generate fully functional pages from simple text prompts, then customize them to match your brand in minutes instead of hours.

In this guide, I'm going to walk you through exactly how to use AI Studio to create pages faster in GoHighLevel—and show you why this tool is becoming essential for modern agencies. Plus, if you haven't tried GoHighLevel yet, you can get a FREE 30-day trial (that's double the standard 14-day trial) to test it yourself.

📋 In This Guide

  • What Is AI Studio in GoHighLevel?
  • How to Access AI Studio
  • Generate Your First Page with AI Prompts
  • Edit and Customize AI-Generated Pages
  • Add Forms, Calendars, and Integrations
  • Best Use Cases for AI Studio

What Is AI Studio in GoHighLevel?

AI Studio is GoHighLevel's intelligent page builder that uses artificial intelligence to generate page layouts, copy, and structure based on your input. Instead of starting with a blank canvas or scrolling through templates, you simply tell AI Studio what you want—and it builds it for you.

Here's what makes it powerful:

  • Speed: Generate a complete page layout in 30 seconds instead of 30 minutes
  • Customization: Edit every element, color, font, and section after generation
  • Smart Content: AI creates relevant headlines, benefit statements, and calls-to-action based on your industry
  • Full Integration: Add forms, calendars, payment buttons, and tracked links directly to AI-generated pages
  • Mobile-Ready: Every page auto-optimizes for mobile without extra work

The key insight: AI Studio doesn't replace designers—it replaces the blank page problem. You're trading 2 hours of staring at nothing for 10 minutes of AI-assisted building plus 15 minutes of refinement.

Try GoHighLevel FREE for 30 Days

Double the standard trial. No credit card required to start.

Start My Free Trial →

How to Access AI Studio

Getting to AI Studio is straightforward:

  1. Log in to GoHighLevel and navigate to your workspace
  2. Go to Pages or Funnels depending on what you're building
  3. Click "Create New Page" or "New Funnel"
  4. Select "AI Studio" instead of the standard page builder or template library
  5. Choose your page type: Landing page, sales page, lead capture, webinar registration, product showcase, etc.

That's it. You're now in AI Studio and ready to start building.

💡 Pro Tip

AI Studio works best when you have a clear idea of what your page needs to do. Before you start, know: Who is this page for? What action do you want them to take? What's the primary benefit?

Generate Your First Page with AI Prompts

This is where the magic happens. AI Studio uses guided prompts to gather the information it needs to build your page.

Here's the process:

Step 1: Describe Your Offer or Purpose
Tell AI Studio what you're selling or promoting. Example: "I'm selling a social media management course for small business owners" or "I want to book discovery calls for my done-for-you service."

Step 2: Define Your Target Audience
Who is this page for? The more specific, the better. "Female entrepreneurs aged 25-40 with a service-based business" gets better results than "business owners."

Step 3: Choose Your Call-to-Action
What should visitors do? Buy now? Schedule a call? Watch a video? Sign up for a webinar?

Step 4: Select Your Page Layout Style
AI Studio offers layout templates optimized for conversions: long-form sales pages, product showcase pages, lead capture pages, webinar registration pages, and more.

Step 5: Generate
Click "Generate Page" and wait 10-30 seconds. AI Studio builds a complete, functional page with headlines, benefit sections, testimonial areas, forms, and a clear conversion path.

Edit and Customize AI-Generated Pages

The generated page is your starting point, not your final product. This is crucial: you have full control over every element.

Text Editing: Click any headline, body copy, or button text to edit. AI's copy is conversion-focused, but it's yours to refine with brand voice, specific details, or client preferences.

Color and Design: Access the design panel to match your brand colors, fonts, and spacing. AI Studio respects your brand guidelines once you set them.

Section Reordering: Drag sections up or down to change page flow. Want testimonials higher? Move them. Want the CTA above the price? Go ahead.

Remove or Add Sections: Delete sections you don't need. Add new sections for videos, comparison tables, FAQs, or custom content.

Image Uploads: Replace AI-generated placeholder images with your own product photos, client photos, or brand images. Pro tip: optimize images before uploading to keep page speed fast.

Add Forms, Calendars, and Integrations

A beautiful page is worthless if it doesn't capture leads or drive action. AI Studio pages are built to integrate with GoHighLevel's native tools:

Forms: Add opt-in forms, contact forms, or multi-step forms. Connect to your CRM automatically so every submission becomes a contact.

Calendars: Embed your booking calendar directly on the page. Visitors can schedule calls or meetings without leaving the page.

Payment Buttons: Add checkout buttons powered by Stripe or PayPal. Sell products or digital courses directly from your AI Studio page.

Tracking and Analytics: Every page gets built-in tracking. Monitor conversion rates, form submissions, button clicks, and traffic sources automatically.

💡 Pro Tip

Use conditional logic on forms to show different next steps based on visitor responses. For example, if someone selects "interested in services," show your calendar link. If they select "just learning," send them to an email sequence instead.

Best Use Cases for AI Studio

1. Rapid Client Onboarding
Client needs a landing page in 24 hours? Generate it with AI Studio, customize in 20 minutes, deploy. Done.

2. A/B Testing Pages
Test two different angles or offers without spending hours on design. Generate variant 1, generate variant 2, split traffic between them, measure results.

3. Lead Magnet Pages
Create pages for free downloads, webinars, or challenges in minutes. Each page can be unique without extra design work.

4. Product Launch Pages
Launching a new service or product? AI Studio builds a complete sales page with benefits, proof points, and CTA in under 30 minutes.

5. Agency White-Label Offerings
If you're a GoHighLevel agency partner, AI Studio becomes a selling point. You can now offer "Done-in-a-day" page creation to clients, increasing margins.

6. Training and Demo Pages
Build pages for webinar registrations, course signups, or event registrations. Each one can be customized in minutes.

The Bottom Line

AI Studio in GoHighLevel isn't about replacing human creativity—it's about eliminating wasted time on the blank page. You still control the final output. You still own the strategy. But now you can go from idea to deployed page in under an hour instead of under a week.

For agencies, that's a massive efficiency gain. For business owners, it means you can test ideas faster and iterate based on real data instead of guessing.

The best way to understand AI Studio is to try it. Start your free 30-day trial today—build a few pages, feel the speed difference, and decide if it's right for your workflow.
